content.json:
# Anomalous / Impossible Travel — Azure Maps
**MITRE ATT&CK:** T1078 Valid Accounts · T1021 Remote Services

**Data source:** `SigninLogs` (Entra ID). The map tile renders on **Azure Maps** (workbook native map visualization). Geo-coordinates come from `LocationDetails.geoCoordinates`.

> Bing Maps for Enterprise is deprecated — this workbook uses Azure Maps. No Bing key required.

content.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType == 0 | extend lat=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude), lon=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude), City=tostring(LocationDetails.city), Country=tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion) | where isnotempty(lat) | summarize SignIns=count() by City, Country, lat, lon | project City, Country, lat, lon, SignIns
content.title: Successful sign-in locations

content.query: SigninLogs | where ResultType == 0 | extend lat=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.latitude), lon=toreal(LocationDetails.geoCoordinates.longitude), City=tostring(LocationDetails.city), Country=tostring(LocationDetails.countryOrRegion) | where isnotempty(lat) | order by UserPrincipalName asc, TimeGenerated asc | serialize | extend pLat=prev(lat), pLon=prev(lon), pTime=prev(TimeGenerated), pUser=prev(UserPrincipalName), pCity=prev(City) | where pUser == UserPrincipalName | extend DistanceKm=2*6371*asin(sqrt(pow(sin((radians(lat)-radians(pLat))/2),2)+cos(radians(pLat))*cos(radians(lat))*pow(sin((radians(lon)-radians(pLon))/2),2))) | extend HoursApart=datetime_diff('minute',TimeGenerated,pTime)/60.0 | extend SpeedKmh=iff(HoursApart>0,DistanceKm/HoursApart,0.0) | where SpeedKmh > 900 and DistanceKm > 500 | project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, FromCity=pCity, ToCity=City, DistanceKm=round(DistanceKm,0), HoursApart=round(HoursApart,2), SpeedKmh=round(SpeedKmh,0)
content.title: Impossible travel (>900 km/h implied speed) — T1078
